    let currentSum = 0;
    let dpPrev = 0;
    const modMap = new Map<number, number>();
    // Initialize with the initial prefix sum (0)
    const initialMod = currentSum % k;
    modMap.set(initialMod, 0 - currentSum); // 0 - 0 = 0

    for (const num of nums) {
        currentSum += num;
        const mod = currentSum % k;
        let candidate = -Infinity;
        if (modMap.has(mod)) {
            candidate = modMap.get(mod)! + currentSum;
        }
        const dpCurrent = Math.max(dpPrev, candidate);
        // Update the modMap for the current mod
        const valueToStore = dpCurrent - currentSum;
        if (modMap.has(mod)) {
            modMap.set(mod, Math.max(modMap.get(mod)! , valueToStore));
        } else {
            modMap.set(mod, valueToStore);
        }
        dpPrev = dpCurrent;
    }

    return currentSum - dpPrev;
}
